prompt: Summarize the high-risk governance controls and escalation expectations using the provided context.

retrieved_contexts.title: High Risk Release Procedure
retrieved_contexts.snippet: High-risk releases require fairness review, security sign-off, incident readiness, and explicit human approval.
retrieved_contexts.content: High Risk Release Procedure requires fairness review, documented red-team outcomes, incident response readiness, enhanced telemetry, and human approval before any deployment.

retrieved_contexts.title: Incident Escalation Standard
retrieved_contexts.snippet: Incident escalation standards require pager ownership, severity classification, and rollback authority.
retrieved_contexts.content: Incident Escalation Standard requires named pager ownership, severity classification, containment actions, rollback authority, and governance notification for high-risk systems.
